description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a red, textured handle. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The handle is straight with a slight ergonomic flare at the base, covered in a red, grippy material for enhanced control and comfort. The shaft connecting the head to the handle is black, likely made of metal or reinforced composite. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for construction, carpentry, or general repair tasks in urban environments. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present, and the hammer appears clean and well-maintained.
description: A claw hammer with a metallic head and a red, textured ergonomic handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full hammer, with the striking face and claw head clearly visible, and the red textured handle prominent.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the hammer, emphasizing the thickness of the head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the curved claw and the back of the hammer head, with the handle's texture and flare at the base visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the width of the hammer head and the symmetry of the handle, with the metallic head's contours visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle with a red rubberized ergonomic grip, featuring a textured surface for enhanced grip and a slight flare at the base.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side for nail removal, made of metallic material.
